race.description: Len Milner Memorial QTIS 3YO Maiden Plate
race.comment: NEVERENOUGHLEGO (3) has switched from a top Victorian yard and has his first run for the Garnett Taylor stable. Placed his last two and has won a Sunshine Coast Inner Track trial since. Has a 2kg claim and rates strongly off the freshen. ZOUSAIN'S CHOICE (5) was only beaten 1.9L at Eagle Farm on debut, in an Open 3. That's good form for a country maiden, and he's drawn to get every chance. WATCHFULWILDERNESS (4) debuts for the Vale yard and has trialled well at the track. Has the rail and the blinkers on for the first time, and he also deserves a betting watch. READYETTE (7) first-starter for the Kris Hansen stable. Watch for any market confidence.
